facts.description: Final selected objects after all eligibility filters, ranking rules, optional group limits, and top-N cutoff.
facts.semantic_acceptance: Accept if exactly these selected objects are featured; IDs may be omitted but names must be identifiable.

facts.description: Selected objects must appear in rule-based ranking order after tie-breaks and any group-limit application.
facts.expected_value: Cedar Plaza Clinic Stop before Juniper School Lot before Canal Market Stop before Oak Towers Courtyard
facts.semantic_acceptance: Accept left-to-right, top-to-bottom, numbered, or hero-to-secondary order if it preserves the expected ranking.

facts.description: Each selected object must show the correct name and required display fields.
expected_value: Cedar Plaza Clinic Stop, arrival: 08:30, daily capacity: 68, lane: pediatric
Juniper School Lot, arrival: 09:45, daily capacity: 74, lane: family
Canal Market Stop, arrival: 11:00, daily capacity: 61, lane: adult
Oak Towers Courtyard, arrival: 12:30, daily capacity: 52, lane: family
facts.semantic_acceptance: Accept equivalent formatting when display values are attached to the correct selected names.

facts.description: The final selection obeys the at-most-1-per-district group limit after sorting.
facts.canonical_answer: Selected group counts are D1: 1, D2: 1, D3: 1, D4: 1; no district exceeds 1.
facts.semantic_acceptance: Accept if the image does not add extra featured objects that would violate the group cap.

facts.description: Filtered-out, group-cap-blocked where applicable, and below-cutoff eligible candidates must not appear as final featured selections.
facts.canonical_answer: Only the selected_objects list should be featured as final selections.
facts.semantic_acceptance: The image may mention exclusion context, but must not promote any unselected object as selected.
allowed_patterns: \b(excluded|exclude|filtered out|not selected|not featured|ineligible|below cutoff|blocked)\b[\s\S]{0,120}\b(Archive\ Mall\ Stop|Private\ Employer\ Bay|Cold\ Chain\ Pending\ Church|Stair\ Access\ Hall|Low\ Capacity\ Pantry|Far\ North\ Depot|Old\ Outreach\ Stop|Draft\ Wellness\ Tent|Priority\ Threshold\ Gym|Cancelled\ Library\ Stop|Training\ Route\ Bay|Beacon\ Park\ Loop|Pine\ Transit\ Bay|Elm\ Health\ Desk|Harbor\ Family\ Room|Maple\ Towers\ Lobby)\b

\b(Archive\ Mall\ Stop|Private\ Employer\ Bay|Cold\ Chain\ Pending\ Church|Stair\ Access\ Hall|Low\ Capacity\ Pantry|Far\ North\ Depot|Old\ Outreach\ Stop|Draft\ Wellness\ Tent|Priority\ Threshold\ Gym|Cancelled\ Library\ Stop|Training\ Route\ Bay|Beacon\ Park\ Loop|Pine\ Transit\ Bay|Elm\ Health\ Desk|Harbor\ Family\ Room|Maple\ Towers\ Lobby)\b[\s\S]{0,120}\b(excluded|exclude|filtered out|not selected|not featured|ineligible|below cutoff|blocked)\b

facts.description: Candidates failing status, window, eligibility, threshold, readiness, rights, or setup rules are not final selections.
facts.canonical_answer: Rows failing eligibility filters are excluded before ranking.
facts.semantic_acceptance: No eligibility-failed candidate should be promoted as selected.

facts.description: Eligible candidates blocked by the district group limit are not final selections.
facts.canonical_answer: Eligible rows that exceed the district cap are excluded after ranking.
facts.semantic_acceptance: No group-cap-blocked candidate should be promoted as selected.

facts.description: Eligible candidates below the final top-N cutoff are not final selections.
facts.canonical_answer: Eligible but lower-ranked rows remain unfeatured because they fall below the selected top-N after group limits.
facts.semantic_acceptance: Below-cutoff candidates should not be promoted as final selections.

calculation_notes: Independent calculation: read clinic_route.sqlite and route_rules.json. Filter rows with equals={'status': 'active', 'service_window': 'outreach_week_2026', 'audience': 'public'}, in={}, gt={'priority_score': 82}, gte={'capacity': 40}, lte={'distance_miles': 12}, bool_true={'cold_chain_ready': True, 'accessible': True}. Sort eligible rows by [{'field': 'priority_score', 'direction': 'desc'}, {'field': 'no_show_risk', 'direction': 'asc'}, {'field': 'distance_miles', 'direction': 'asc'}, {'field': 'name', 'direction': 'asc'}]. Apply group cap district<=1 while scanning the ranked list, then select top 4. Eligible ranked order is M701, M702, M703, M704, M705, M706, M707, M708, M720. Selected IDs are M701, M702, M703, M704. Group-cap blocked IDs are M705, M706, M707, M708. Eligible below-cutoff IDs are M720. Exclude eligibility-failed IDs M709, M710, M711, M712, M713, M714, M715, M716, M717, M718, M719; also exclude group-cap-blocked and below-cutoff eligible rows from final featured selections.
